description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a smooth, black surface and slightly upturned nose and tail. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin edge, and is topped with a solid black grip tape for traction. The skateboard is supported by two sets of red wheels, likely made of polyurethane, attached to metal trucks beneath the deck. The trucks are not highly visible but are standard in design, connecting the wheels to the board. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. The skateboard is well-suited for street and park use, offering a durable and functional build for urban environments.
description: A classic, black skateboard with a wooden edge, red wheels, and a minimalistic design. The deck is plain with solid black grip tape and no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, red wheels, and the thin wooden edge.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the deck, wheels, and wooden edge.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, showing the deck's width and grip tape.
attribute_wheel_type: street, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, metallic, partially visible, no branding or unique features apparent
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
